name: everything-game-dev-code
description: A game development scaffold for Claude Code with layered rules, specialized agents, reusable skills, workflow commands, contexts, hooks, and engine-isolated packs for Unity, Unreal, and Godot.
installation_notes: Use common rules as the baseline layer.
Activate only one engine-specific pack at a time unless you are intentionally doing cross-engine analysis.
Keep engine-specific implementation details inside the corresponding engine layer.
Treat GDD, technical design, QA, and release documents as living source-of-truth artifacts.
